# Autogenerated concatenated results

`parquet` files in this folder are automatically generated by a GH-action `/github/workflows/update-parquet-files.yml` which essentially runs `scripts/combine_mgf_results.py`. 

## Workflow

1. It clones all the `analysis-results-cluster-XX-crate` repositories available in the emo-bon GH space.
2. retrieves summary download links from the `ro-crate-metadata.json` files for each of the RO-Crates.
3. It concatenates all those tables for taxonomic (`LSU`, `SSU`) and functional (`go`, `go_slim`) annotations.
4. If they are different from the existing ones in the `data/emo-bon_data/` folder, it will create a PR for their update. This should happen when more RO-Crates are published on GH

As of 26/02/2026, these tables are not use in the dashboards, because:

- `cluster-01` contains 168 RO-Crates, while the current tables in `data/parquet_files` contain correct 181 tables, so it would mean a downgrade.
- Crates on GH for `cluste-02` contain correct links, however the s3 buckets are not set with permissions for public download, until then the workflow cannot use those results.
